query:
SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1 FROM users u
            JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id
            JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id
            JOIN permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id
            WHERE u.username = 'testadmin' AND p.key = '*:*'
        ) AS "exists!"
